title: RankRAG: Instruction Fine-Tuning for Context Ranking and Answer Generation in Retrieval-Augmented Generation

defines.name: RankRAG
defines.definition: A single-LLM instruction fine-tuning framework that jointly learns to rerank retrieved contexts and generate answers for RAG.

problem: Standard RAG often retrieves too many contexts for effective generation, while retrievers may miss relevant evidence and separate ranking models can generalize poorly.
